_comment: This file is OVERWRITTEN each security review. Do NOT append to it.

ssh_attacks.fail2ban_status: active - sshd jail running, 4 currently banned, 3237 total banned
ssh_attacks.change_since_last: Failed attempts at 22192 (up from 21736, +456). fail2ban total bans 3237 (up from 3175, +62). 4 IPs currently banned (down from 9 — bans expired for inactive attackers). Continued botnet scanning activity at normal rate. Only authorized logins from novakj via publickey (ED25519).

pdf_security.innerHTML_note: 36 usages across 12 files: viewer.js(4), bookmarks.js(3), annotate.js(2), img2pdf.js(2), upload.js(2), merge.js(3), pages.js(4), split.js(6), redact.js(3), signatures.js(2), text-overlay.js(2), ocr.js(1), crop.js(2) - all static templates, clearing operations, static SVGs, HTML entities, escaped user data (escapeHtml/escapeAttr), or integer-only interpolation. No user data injected unsafely. page-numbers.js has 0 innerHTML usages.

page_numbers_module_review.user_data_handling: Custom text from input processed via string replace with {page}/{total}/{date}/{filename} placeholders. Text only rendered via canvas drawText and pdf-lib drawText — never injected into HTML. Filename from File API, only used in PDF text and passed to downloadBlob() which sanitizes via sanitizeFilename(). Color input parsed by hex regex. Font size clamped 8-24. Margin clamped 10-144. Start number floored to 1.
page_numbers_module_review.dom_construction: All UI interactions via getElementById and querySelector with event listeners. Canvas rendering uses 2D context API only. No dynamic HTML generation.

crop_module_review.innerHTML_note: 2 usages: clearing canvas container (line 171), static SVG in button reset (line 738). No user data in HTML.
crop_module_review.bug_fix_verified: Line 684 now correctly uses { ...mb } and { ...cb } (object spread) instead of broken [...mb]/[...cb] (array spread). Undo function (lines 745-788) properly restores original mediaBox/cropBox via pdf-lib.

bookmarks_module_review.innerHTML_note: 3 usages: clearing container (line 93), static SVG arrow (line 148), filter highlight via highlightMatch() with escapeHtml() (line 168). Bookmark titles displayed via textContent by default. Filter highlight uses escapeHtml() on all text segments before wrapping match in <mark> tag.

ocr_module_review.innerHTML_note: 1 usage: static SVG icon for extract button reset (line 249). Extracted text displayed in textarea.value, stats via textContent.

img2pdf_module_review.innerHTML_note: 2 usages: clearing list (line 199), template with escapeHtml()/escapeAttr() for names, integers for dimensions/indices (line 208). All user strings properly escaped.
img2pdf_module_review.image_validation: MIME type via ACCEPTED_TYPES Set + file extension regex. Both checked with OR logic.

redact_module_review.redaction_limitation: Draws opaque rectangles but does NOT remove underlying content streams. Hidden data may still be extractable.

signatures_module_review.fetch_data_url: Line 798 uses fetch(sig.dataURL) where dataURL is from canvas.toDataURL(). Valid in modern browsers. Image type validated at upload (PNG/JPEG/WebP only). Size validated (2MB limit). No security concern.

jszip_min_js.purpose: ZIP file creation for split and convert module downloads

known_issues: server_tokens set to 'build' - leaks nginx version (nginx/1.26.3 Ubuntu) in Server header. Should be 'off'.
No general *.md nginx block - only CLAUDE.md specifically blocked. Any new .md file added to webroot would be publicly accessible.
UFW firewall is inactive - only SSH and HTTP/HTTPS ports are needed but no firewall enforces this
disable_symlinks off in nginx config - low risk since only novakj can write to webroot
CGI location block exists in nginx but no CGI scripts present - dead config that could be removed
Codex proxy at /codex returns 502 - backend not running. No security risk but dead endpoint.
TASK-016 redaction tool draws opaque rectangles but does NOT strip underlying content streams - redacted text/images may still be extractable from the PDF file. Users should be warned.

img2pdf.js image validation uses OR logic (MIME type OR extension) - slightly permissive but acceptable for client-side processing since images are rendered via browser Image API which rejects non-images.
notes: Full security review completed - 43 checks passed, 0 critical security findings

NEW: Reviewed page-numbers.js module (TASK-021, 514 lines): 0 innerHTML usages. Custom text only rendered via canvas 2D context and pdf-lib drawText — never in HTML. Color parsed by hex regex. Font size clamped 8-24. Margin clamped 10-144. Download uses sanitizeFilename(). No eval/Function/document.write. XSS-safe. SECURE.
VERIFIED: crop.js (TASK-020) bug fix confirmed — line 684 now uses { ...mb } / { ...cb } (object spread). Undo function properly restores mediaBox/cropBox. No new security concerns.
All JS files scanned (21 in js/ + 2 in lib/): no eval(), Function(), document.write(), or unsafe patterns found
36 innerHTML usages across 12 files - all verified safe (down from 37; bookmarks.js reduced from 4 to 3). page-numbers.js has 0 innerHTML.

SSH: Continued botnet scanning. Failed attempts at 22192 (+456 since last review). fail2ban total bans 3237 (+62). 4 IPs currently banned (down from 9 — bans expired for inactive scanners). Only authorized logins from novakj via publickey (ED25519).
SSL certificate valid until June 18, 2026 (78 days remaining)
recommendations: MEDIUM: Add user-facing warning in redaction UI that underlying PDF data may not be fully removed - only visually covered.
LOW: Set server_tokens off in nginx.conf to stop leaking version info (currently exposes nginx/1.26.3)
LOW: Enable UFW firewall (sudo ufw allow 22,80,443/tcp && sudo ufw enable)
LOW: Add general *.md deny rule to nginx with explicit exception for known safe files
LOW: Remove unused CGI location block from nginx config (no scripts exist)
LOW: Consider disable_symlinks on in nginx for defense in depth
